login.subtitle: Log in to your Kiba account.

signup.subtitle: Start calling agents in seconds.
signup.password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters.

agents.title: Agents
agents.subtitle: Live registry on {{network}} · browse and call specialist agents.
agents.no_match: No agents matched "{{query}}". Try a different phrasing.
agents.help_text: Explore our docs or try calling a recommended agent.

playground.title: Playground
playground.subtitle: Describe a task, run a call, and watch the x402 payment flow settle on-chain.
playground.send_desc: Pick an agent, edit the JSON payload, and run a live call.
playground.tip_text: Use the prompts below or write your own JSON payload.
playground.response_placeholder: Run a request to see the agent response here.

billing.title: Billing
billing.subtitle: Top up credits and review your invoices.
billing.tip_body: — Top up anytime to keep your agents running smoothly.
billing.topup_desc: Pay in dollars — we convert to {{kibix_label}} instantly ($1 = {{rate}} {{kibix_label}}). Demo mode adds them instantly; production would route through Stripe Checkout.
billing.err_amount_cap: Single topup capped at $1000 in demo mode

breb.payment_status_retry: The payment ended in status {{status}}. You can try again.
breb.memo_warning: Without the memo the deposit is NOT credited.
breb.deposit_note: We detect the payment automatically via Horizon. Make sure to send USDC (not XLM) on the {{network}} network.
breb.qr_instructions: Open your banking app, scan the QR or pay to the Bre-B key. Crediting is automatic.
breb.sandbox_note: Sandbox mode: no real charge. The button simulates the PSP webhook that would confirm a real Bre-B payment.
breb.recharge_desc: Choose a payment method. We convert to Kibix instantly.
breb.recharge_desc_co: Pay in pesos from your bank, no wallet or crypto.

wallet.title: Top up with your Stellar wallet
wallet.description: Connect an external wallet (Freighter, xBull, Albedo…) and send USDC straight to your Kiba wallet. No memo or QR.
wallet.sent_body: Your on-chain balance will update in a few seconds.

overview.title: Overview
overview.subtitle: A snapshot of your Kiba account.
overview.tx_empty: No activity yet. Make your first call from a connected channel.
overview.help_text: Check out our docs or reach out to our team.

connect.title: Get started
connect.subtitle: Use Kiba from Claude or ChatGPT, or install it in your editor — then discover and pay agents straight from your chat.

panel.banner_text: Connect it to Claude or ChatGPT, or install it in your editor — then discover and pay agents straight from your chat.
panel.method1_title: Use it in Claude or ChatGPT (web)
panel.method1_sub: Paste one URL — nothing to install. Works in Claude (web & desktop) and ChatGPT.
panel.connector_url_desc: It asks you to sign in to Kiba (OAuth) — no API keys, no extra setup.
panel.claude_step_3: Click “Add” and sign in to Kiba to authorize
panel.chatgpt_step_1: Settings → Apps & Connectors → Advanced settings → enable “Developer mode”
panel.chatgpt_step_2: Connectors → “Create”, name it and paste the URL
panel.method2_title: Install in your editor (Cursor, Claude Code, Claude Desktop)
panel.method2_sub: Get the one-click installer, or add the server to your MCP config manually.
panel.installer_desc: Installs the kiba server into Claude Desktop, Cursor and Claude Code automatically — per-user, no admin required.
panel.download_note: macOS / Linux? Use the manual config below.
panel.config_desc_1: Add this to your MCP settings (e.g.
panel.config_desc_2: or your IDE), then restart. On first use your browser opens to sign in to Kiba.
panel.foot_2: , where you can revoke them anytime.

overview.title: Revenue
overview.subtitle: Your agents earn {{netPct}}% of every paid call, settled on {{network}}.
overview.activity_desc: Per-agent revenue on-chain. Platform fee: {{feePct}}% · you keep {{netPct}}%.
overview.empty_text: Publish your first agent to start earning per call.
overview.cta_title: How you earn as a publisher
overview.cta_sub: Users pay per call via x402. {{netPct}}% lands in your wallet automatically — Kiba keeps a {{feePct}}% platform fee on every transaction.

agents.title: My Agents
agents.subtitle: Register, edit and retire the agents owned by your custodial wallet.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.subtitle: Usage across your agents — calls served and revenue share.
analytics.empty_calls_text: Once your agents start serving paid calls, usage shows up here.
analytics.banner_text: Publishers keep {{netPct}}% of every paid call — visible on-chain after each transaction.

payouts.title: Payouts
payouts.subtitle: Earnings settle directly to your custodial wallet on {{network}}. Publishers keep {{netPct}}% of every paid call.
payouts.wallet_desc: Every paid call sends {{netPct}}% here atomically via the on-chain contract.
payouts.info: On testnet your earnings accrue as real {{asset}} in this custodial wallet. A self-serve withdrawal to an external address is on the roadmap; for now the balance is fully visible and verifiable on-chain.
payouts.history_desc: On-chain settlements from paid agent calls.
payouts.empty_text: When users call your agents, earnings appear here as paid settlements.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Set a price per call for each agent. Users only pay when your agent runs.
pricing.how_desc: Simple pay-per-call — no subscriptions or hidden fees.
pricing.benefit_pay_text: Each agent invocation is a single micropayment via x402.
pricing.benefit_keep_text: Kiba takes a {{feePct}}% platform fee; the rest lands in your wallet instantly.
pricing.benefit_run_text: Consumers are charged only when your agent successfully runs.

publish.step_desc_hint: What your agent does for users
publish.step_endpoint_hint: URL the gateway calls on each request
publish.tip_1: Pick a short service slug — it becomes the public API path.
publish.tip_2: Start with a low price while you test; you can raise it anytime.
publish.tip_3: Your endpoint must respond within the gateway timeout.
publish.tip_4: Descriptions show up in the consumer marketplace.
publish.title: Publish
publish.subtitle: Register a new agent on-chain. One form — identity, endpoint, pricing and go live.
publish.checklist_desc: Everything you need before going live.

register.desc_1: Your custodial wallet signs the on-chain
register.desc_2: instruction. Payments from clients ({{pct}}%) land in this wallet directly.
register.service_hint: Lowercase, alphanumeric, dashes/underscores allowed. Max 32 chars.
register.endpoint_hint: The HTTP endpoint clients hit. Must implement the x402 handshake.
register.description_placeholder: What does this agent do? Be specific about inputs and outputs.
register.description_hint: {{len}} / 512 chars. This helps the discovery indexer.
register.floor_price_hint_1: On-chain minimum. Your agent can charge more per request via

my_agents.title: My agents
my_agents.summary_one: {{count}} agent owned by your custodial wallet · Total earned:
my_agents.summary_other: {{count}} agents owned by your custodial wallet · Total earned:
my_agents.empty: No agents yet. Publish your first one to start earning.

publisher_gate.title: Become a publisher
publisher_gate.desc: List your agents, earn per call, and track your revenue. Same account, same login — publishing unlocks the tools to monetize your agents.

benefits.list_agents_desc: Register your agent on-chain in minutes.
benefits.earn_desc: You keep {{pct}}% of every paid call.
benefits.track_desc: Live earnings, calls and per-agent stats.

publisher_gate.name_hint: Shown next to your agents. You can change it later in Settings.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Account, wallet and identity.
settings.profile_desc: Your personal account information on Kiba.
settings.custodial_wallet_desc_before: Your Stellar keypair. Lives in the gateway. Signs every
settings.balance_hint: {{units}} {{unit_name}} — refilled on-demand from the gateway treasury when you make a call
settings.treasury_hint: When your custodial runs low, the gateway transfers {{asset}} from this master wallet to yours.
settings.security_desc: Manage how your account stays secure and how you receive updates.

credentials.title: Credentials
credentials.subtitle: Manage who can pay agents on your behalf using API keys and OAuth-connected apps.
credentials.cta_text: Need help securing your workspace? Learn best practices for API keys, permissions, and integrating trusted apps.
credentials.api_keys_desc: Long-lived secrets for direct REST API access. Use as
credentials.secret_hint: Copy this now — it won't be shown again.
credentials.no_keys: No API keys yet. Create your first API key to get started.
credentials.connected_apps_desc: Apps you've authorized via OAuth (Claude Desktop, Cursor, MCP clients). Revoke access at any time.
credentials.no_connected_apps: No connected apps installed yet. When you authorize an app, it will appear here.

platform.title: Platform Revenue
platform.subtitle: Treasury overview and the {{pct}}% commission Kiba earns on agent usage.
platform.commission_desc: Hardcoded in the smart contract. No off-chain accounting needed.
platform.step1_text: Users call agents on the Kiba platform and pay for the service.
platform.step2_text: Payments are settled on-chain in {{asset}}. Agents receive {{pct}}% of the payment.
platform.step3_text: Kiba automatically collects a {{pct}}% commission and routes it to the treasury.
platform.banner_text: All fees are visible on-chain and used to improve the platform for everyone.
platform.cta_text: Treasury funds are used to support ecosystem growth, platform reliability, and future rewards for the community.

usage.title: Usage
usage.subtitle: Spend over time, breakdown by agent and channel.
usage.cta_text: Start exploring agents to see usage insights.

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.subtitle: Every call, top-up and refund — auditable on Stellar when on-chain mode is active.
